---
output: 
    html_document:
        toc: TRUE
        toc_float: TRUE
---

<br>

## McMahon et al (2019)

<div class="column-left">
[<img src="images/McMahon2019.png" style="width:75%; border:5px solid; margin-right: 20px" align="left">](files/McMahon2019_JoV.pdf)
</div>

<div class="column-right">
McMahon, E., Zheng, C. Y., Pereira, F., Gonzalez, R., Ungerleider, L.G. & Vaziri-Pashkam, M. (2017) Understanding Action Prediction with Machine Learning and Psychophysics. <i>Journal of Vision</i> 19(7): 1-16.
</div>
<br><br>

## Corbetta et al (2017)

<div class="column-left">
[<img src="images/Corbetta2018.png" style="width:75%; border:5px solid; margin-right: 20px" align="left">](files/Corbetta2017_KinesiologyReview.pdf)
</div>

<div class="column-right">
Corbetta, D., Wiener, R. F., Thurman, S. L., & McMahon, E. (2018). The Embodied Origins of Infant
Reaching: Implications for the Emergence of Eye-Hand Coordination. <i>Kinesiology Review</i> 7: 10-17.
</div>
